title: Design and Provision VPC Network Architecture
description: Define VPC, public/private subnets, NAT gateways, and route tables using Terraform modules. Foundation for EKS.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
acceptance_criteria: VPC CIDR 10.0.0.0/16 created; Subnets across 3 AZs; NAT Gateways active
definition_of_done: Terraform apply successful; Network reachability verification passed

title: Implement EKS Control Plane and Node Groups
description: Provision EKS cluster, OIDC provider, and managed node groups using Terraform.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
acceptance_criteria: EKS 1.29+ active; Nodes in private subnets; OIDC provider linked
definition_of_done: kubectl get nodes returns Ready status for all node groups

title: Provision RDS PostgreSQL with pgvector
description: Deploy RDS instance in private subnets. Enable pgvector extension via parameter group.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
acceptance_criteria: RDS active; Encryption at rest; pgvector extension verifiable
definition_of_done: Connection string valid; Extension creation query succeeds
deployment_notes: Apply IVFFlat indexing immediately per RISK-004

title: Initialize Next.js Repo and Tailwind Config
description: Setup Next.js 14+ app router, configure Tailwind CSS with custom colors/fonts for '2040' theme.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
acceptance_criteria: Build passes; Theme variable functioning; Radix UI primitives installed
definition_of_done: Repo initialized; CI pipeline build step passing

title: Implement Passport JWT Strategy for Cognito
description: Configure Passport strategy to validate JWT signature using Cognito JWKS. Backend Auth Module.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
acceptance_criteria: Validate iss/aud claims; Cache JWKS; Reject invalid tokens
definition_of_done: Unit tests passing for token validation; Guard implemented

title: Implement Login Page with MFA Handling
description: Create login form handling username/password and subsequent TOTP challenge.
sprint_goal: Establish Secure Cloud Foundation & Authentication Core
acceptance_criteria: Login success/failure flows; MFA challenge screen; Session storage
definition_of_done: E2E test with MFA user passes

title: Implement AWS Comprehend PII Redaction Service
description: Backend service to extract text from SOWs and redact PII using AWS Comprehend.
sprint_goal: AI SOW Processing & Vector Matching Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: PDF/DOCX text extracted; PII replaced with placeholders; Redacted text saved
definition_of_done: Unit tests with sample PII pass redaction verification

title: Implement OpenAI Extraction Service
description: Send redacted text to OpenAI to extract structured JSON (Skills, Deliverables).
sprint_goal: AI SOW Processing & Vector Matching Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Valid JSON output via Zod; Token limit handling; Retry logic
definition_of_done: Extraction accuracy > 90% on test set; Schema validation passing

title: Implement RBAC Guards and Decorators
description: Create @Roles decorator and Global Guard for backend role checking.
sprint_goal: AI SOW Processing & Vector Matching Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Roles extracted from JWT; Endpoints secured; Public decorator works
definition_of_done: Integration tests passing for all role combinations

title: Configure EKS Security Groups and Access Controls
description: Define security groups and aws-auth configmap for EKS.
sprint_goal: AI SOW Processing & Vector Matching Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Control plane locked down; Node-to-control plane comms working
definition_of_done: kubectl auth can-i verify permissions; Penetration test simulation

title: Provision OpenSearch Domain
description: Deploy managed OpenSearch domain for immutable audit logging.
sprint_goal: AI SOW Processing & Vector Matching Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Domain active in VPC; Encryption enabled; IAM policy configured

description: Design and implement Saga pattern for payout consistency (DB, Stripe, Audit).

title: Stripe Webhook Handler & Reconciliation
description: Implement webhook receiver for Stripe events and daily reconciliation job (Derived Task).
acceptance_criteria: Verify webhook signatures; Handle duplicate events; Reconciliation report generation
definition_of_done: Webhook processing test coverage > 90%; DLQ implementation verified

title: End-to-End System Integration Testing
description: Full system testing covering Auth -> SOW Upload -> AI Processing -> Vendor Matching -> Payout.
acceptance_criteria: Critical path flows verified; Risk scenarios validated; Performance baseline met
